configurations.name: lantern-dev
configurations.comment: Preview-tool dev server: runs the main checkout's server from the project root (relative cwd, required by the sandboxed preview tool). The isolated C:/dev/lantern-os-dev worktree is launched separately by scripts, not by the preview tool. Uses server-dev.js (not server.js) so the launcher-injected PORT env var is stripped before boot, otherwise session-secret.js refuses to start (PORT set => non-loopback => SESSION_SECRET required). See docs/DEV-SERVER-WORKTREE.md.
